servinfo.title: Description of Cruise Control System Cancel Conditions
servinfo.ptxt: Constant cruising is canceled under any one of the following conditions.

item.ptxt: *Vehicle speed becomes lower than minimum operating speed (36 km/h (22 mile/h)).
*Actual vehicle speed is continuously lower than set vehicle by a specified amount.
*Brake pedal is depressed (Brake light switch is turned ON).
*Clutch pedal is depressed (CPP No.2 switch is turned ON).
*Gear shift lever is in 1st or 2nd position.
Acceleration of vehicle is out of the specified value.
Deceleration of vehicle is out of the specified value.

attention3.ptxt: When constant cruising is canceled due to a condition with * (asterisk), vehicle speed before cancellation can be resumed by operating RES/ACC switch, provided that vehicle speed is higher than 40 km/h (25 mile/h).
